title: Resettable Repair Costs
description: Adds a Way to Reset The Repair Cost on Items!
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8919530ec31d7af2f27d40c472b4838cd0c56225.png)

# **IMPORTANT** - I (AverageTaTeMan) only share my content on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/averagetateman/), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AverageTaTeMan), and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/averagetateman/projects) - If you see this project on any other site, IT IS NOT ME AND SHOULD NOT BE TRUSTED!

Ever had one of your beloved items say "Too Expensive" when you put it in an anvil? This Data Pack helps to avoid that pain, allowing an items repair cost to be reset by putting it in a Smithing Table with an Echo Shard and one of its repair material. Additionally, several items that didn't have a specified repair item in an Anvil now also have one.

### **List of Items and Their Associated Repair Items**
- Wooden Tools, Shield, Bow, Crossbow, Fishing Rod, Carrot on a Stick, Warped Fungus on a Stick: Any Wooden Planks
- Stone Tools: Cobblestone, Cobbled Deepslate, Blackstone
- Copper Tools/Armor, Brush: Copper Ingots
- Iron Tools/Armor, Chainmail Armor, Flint and Steel, Shears: Iron Ingots
- Golden Tools/Armor: Gold Ingots
- Diamond Tools/Armor: Diamonds
- Netherite Tools/Armor: Netherite Ingots
- Leather Armor: Leather
- Turtle Shell: Turtle Scutes
- Wolf Armor: Armadillo Scutes
- Elytra: Phantom Membrane
- Trident: Prismarine Crystals
- Mace: Breeze Rods
